---
name: "Bug Report"
about: Create a report to help us improve and fix bugs.
title: "[BUG] <Short, descriptive title>"
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Pre-flight Checklist
*Please ensure you have completed the following tasks before submitting this issue:*
- [ ] I have verified this bug exists on the latest version of the main branch.
- [ ] I have searched existing issues to ensure this has not already been reported.
- [ ] I have provided a minimal reproduction repository or code snippet (if applicable).

## Bug Description
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce
Steps to reproduce the behavior:
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '....'
3. Scroll down to '....'
4. See error

## Expected Behavior
A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

## Screenshots / Video
If applicable, add screenshots to help explain your problem.

## Environment Information
Please complete the following information:
- **OS/OS Version:** [e.g. Ubuntu 24.04, macOS 13.4]
- **Python Version:** [e.g. 3.11.4]
- **LLVM Version:** [e.g. 19.1.4, commit hash `a1b2c3d`, package source]
- **Docc Version:** [e.g. v0.40, commit hash `a1b2c3d`]

## Additional Context
Add any other context about the problem here (e.g., stack traces, logs, console outputs).
